de.name: Tägliches Lieferanten-Briefing
de.description: Lieferanten-Tagesbriefing — Dubletten, fehlende Pflichtfelder, abgelaufene Konditionen, Performance — täglich um 07:00.

prefill.name: Tägliches Lieferanten-Briefing
prefill.description: 3-4 wichtigsten Lieferanten-Stammdaten-Themen für den Tag — Dubletten, Pflichtfelder, Konditionen, Performance.

angles: Abgelaufene oder bald auslaufende Konditionen / Rahmenverträge
Single-Source-Risiken (Artikel nur bei einem Lieferanten verfügbar)

en.name: Daily Supplier Briefing
en.description: Supplier daily briefing — duplicates, missing fields, expired terms, performance — every day at 07:00.

prefill.name: Daily Supplier Briefing
prefill.description: Top 3-4 supplier master-data topics for today — duplicates, fields, terms, performance.

angles: Supplier duplicates (same VAT ID/IBAN/address more than once)
Missing required fields (IBAN, VAT ID, payment terms, contact person)
Expired or soon-expiring terms / framework agreements
Suppliers with no linked products (dead records)
Single-source risks (products only available from one supplier)
Performance issues (delivery delays, high complaint rate)
Supplier agent jobs in requires_intervention (Supplier RFQ, Reorder Proposal stuck)
